name: Bar Ferdinando
note: Italian bar and cafe reviving 121-year-old Ferdinando's Focacceria. From Sal Lamboglia (Cafe Spaghetti, Swoony's). Opened April 15, 2026.

name: Lithos Mediterranean Cuisine
note: Modern Greek restaurant with Mykonos energy in FiDi. Seafood orzo, grilled lamb chops, Mediterranean sea bass. Opened April 1, 2026.

name: Pies 'n' Thighs
note: New Prospect Heights location for 20th anniversary. Fried chicken, homemade pies, Southern sides.

name: After Eden | Cocktail & Coffee Bar
note: Vietnamese coffee shop by day, bar by night. Jackfruit lattes, cà phê muối, pho-tini cocktails. Opened April 10, 2026.

name: Whits
address: 34 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003
note: Late-night slider joint with onion rings, fries, ripper hot dogs, Pat Lafrieda patties. Opened April 9, 2026.

name: One40 Rooftop Restaurant & Bar
note: 22nd-floor rooftop bar at One40 Rooftop with downtown skyline views. Golden Hour outdoor extension opened April 15, 2026.
